src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.general_idea: Remove unused imports for HttpServletResponse, Logger, and LoggerFactory to clean up the code.
Introduce a ThreadLocal variable to pass UUID context within the thread, replacing header-based logging logic.
Remove the instance variable for Logger since it is no longer used in the class.
Simplify audit logic by removing environment-based conditional logging and response status extraction, always submitting logs to the pool.
Change the default UUID value in the log document from 'unknown' to 'anonymous' to match the ThreadLocal initial value.
Remove the status field from the LogDocument as it is no longer extracted from the response.
Change duration calculation from floating-point division to integer division, likely to store duration as an integer or long.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.general_idea: Rename the Statistic service interface to StatisticService to follow Spring naming conventions.
Update method call to use the renamed StatisticService instance.
Refactor bot status check to use a static field in SysConfigService instead of an instance method.
Remove the endpoint for retrieving release strategies as it is no longer needed.
Remove the endpoint for retrieving the maximum history count as it is no longer needed.
Add a new endpoint to retrieve the full system configuration object.
Add import for the new Sys POJO used in the new endpoint.
Remove unused import for Set since the getStrategy endpoint was removed.
Rename the Statistic service interface to StatisticService to follow Spring naming conventions.
Remove the endpoint for retrieving the minimum daily submission count.
Refactor direct field access to use a service layer method for retrieving top submissions.
Refactor direct field access to use a nested service object and renamed constant for max history.

Improve log message clarity for bot enablement due to time.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Changed the 'sys' field from instance to static to allow access without an instance or to share state across instances.
Removed the botStatus method which returned the bot status from the sys object.
Removed the getTop method which returned the top submissions from the sys object.
Removed the getReleaseStrategy method which returned the release strategies from the sys object.
Removed the getSelectedReleaseStrategy method which returned the selected release strategy from the sys object.
Removed the getMinSubmissions method which returned the minimum submissions count from the sys object.
Removed the getMaxHistory method which returned the maximum history count from the sys object.
Added a getSys method to expose the sys object, likely replacing the removed specific getters.
Updated the comment for the init method to clarify that multiple instances writing default values is safe because they are identical.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.before: 如果有多个实例启动，会导致多次初始化，但是不会有问题
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.after: 如果有多个实例启动，会导致多次初始化，但是不会有问题，因为只有不存在的时候才会写入默认值，而且多个实例写入的默认值是一样的
